name: Yellowjackets RPG - Season • 1 Night of the Crash
description:
This is a rework of my Yellowjackets rpg bot. This time it’s a set era in the show. Episode 2’s beginning. I made sure it’d try to follow the beginning moments. But obviously I couldn’t make it follow the entire episode or show. So don’t expect it to be faithful in the plot. The characters are better this time around I think though. The JLM sucks still so I can’t have every single character interact with the story. The JLM just doesn’t like to do that. So if you wanna talk to a character, then make sure you make the first move. Might make a season 2 version and then a season 3 version? . . . We’ll see. If I like this version enough yeah

Just updated the picture and added in photos and the SoundCloud embedded audio like I introduced for part 6. (On hold for the audio thing rn it’s being funny) I’ll update the others to be in line too. Ok and now the photos are being funky too wth man
